title: T-041 — UI: TEC-024 BOM Generator modal (PARTIAL — gallery anchor)
prompt: Build BOM Generator modal per §7.3 + UX:1314-1338. Selection scope (All Complete vs Selected FAs), output mode (per-FG vs single-batch), submit -> POST /api/technical/bom-generator (T-016). Visual reference: `tech_modal_gallery` design/Monopilot Design System/technical/modals.jsx:619-655 (PARTIAL — gallery includes sketches but no isolated label; treat UX spec UX:1314-1338 as parity reference per Step 7 fallback to UX). RED tests/ui/tec-024-bom-generator.test.tsx. Run: `pnpm vitest run tests/ui/tec-024-bom-generator.test.tsx`.

pipeline_inputs.description: BOM Generator confirm modal — RadioGroup scope + RadioGroup output mode + multi-select FA picker.
pipeline_inputs.details: When scope='selected_fgs', show searchable picker of FGs with Status_Overall='Complete'. Submit returns job_id; show success toast with link to job status.
acceptance_criteria: Given the modal opens, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/technical/modals.jsx:619-655 (gallery anchor) and the UX contract at UX:1314-1338, then it has the same scope/output radio groups and Cancel/Confirm buttons — structural + visual + interaction parity verified by RTL with parity checklist in details.
Given scope='selected_fgs' and 0 FGs picked, when Confirm clicked, then validation error.
Given valid submission, when API returns job_id, then a success toast appears.
risk_red_lines: Do not include FGs without Status_Overall='Complete' (V-TEC-15).
